title: taraxacum brassicifolium
intro: Taraxacum brassicifolium, also known as the small dandelion or brassica dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's leaves and roots have been used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections, due to its health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving liver function. Taraxacum brassicifolium can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
